name: Escanor | Summoning
description:
Escanor is the NPC where you summon for units! It currently has 4 Banners :
Mythic Banner | Opm Banner | Chainsawman Banner | Overheaven banner

name: Megumin | Stat Rerolls
description: Megumin is the stat reroll npc, here you reroll your units stats. You can roll all stats at once or individual stats using Stat Cubes.

name: Nokotan | Traits
description: Nokotan is the Trait Npc, where you can roll traits on both units and Artifacts.

name: Mob | Evolutions
description: Mob is the evolution npc, here you evolve your units.

name: Guts | Crafting
description: Guts is the crafting npc for rune stones and crafting materials.

name: Frieren | Level Rewards
description: Frieren is the level reward NPC, every 5 levels you can claim rewards containing gems and rerolls.

name: Boros | Tournaments
description: Access Ranked and Casual modes. Ranked play includes unit restrictions and leaderboard entry. Buy Unit frames or Inventory Capacity in the tournament shop.

name: Yuta | Tower Adventures
description: NPC that grants the quest to obtain the Tower Adventures portal. Required: Clear 40 wave (infinity mode nightmare).

name: Alucard | Daily Shop
description: Daily shop npc for buying items with coins and event currency. Refreshes every 24 hours.

name: Rukia | Ice Gacha, Artifact Store
description: Shop for artifacts and an ice gacha banner with a 0.1% chance for the Rukia unit.

name: Griffith | Void Room Teleporter
description: Teleports you to the sacrifice room where you can access shops and crafting.

name: Femto | Sacrificer
description: NPC for sacrificing Mythic units for Behelits and crafting Griffith or Guts.

name: Guts | Tp Back
description: Lets you leave the sacrifice room.

name: Anya | Night Market
description: Weekly rotation of 5 units purchasable with Night Market coins. Includes Exclusive, Secret, and Heavenly units.

name: Albedo | Lab
description: Sacrifice Exclusives, Secrets, Mythics, and Legendaries for Trait Rerolls.

name: Sung Jin Woo | Quest NPC / Secret Craft
description: Grants the quest to obtain the Jeju Island portal. Allows crafting Beru and Igris from Jeju drops.

name: Whis | Unit Trading
description: NPC for crafting high-tier units like UI Goku, Boros, Saitama, and more.

name: Sakamoto | Leaderboards
description: Displays season leaderboard rankings and rewards.

name: Garou | OPM Event
description: Cosmic Annihilation gamemode. Battle the God boss for Saitama, Blast, and Garou related drops.

name: Jester Zid | Skin Wheel
description: Spin for special skins and rewards.

name: Rudo | Artifact Crafter
description: Artifact crafting NPC located in the upgrade area.

name: Pucci | Limit Breaker
description: Limitbreak units to Level 150. Requires Level 100 unit and 1x Limit Breaker item.

name: Frieren | Quest
description: Grants the Frieren special event quest.

name: Kurumi | Quest
description: Grants the Kurumi event quest.

name: Shinra | Quest
description: Grants the Shinra quest.

name: Broly | Quest
description: Grants the Broly quest.

name: Wukong | Quest
description: Grants the Wukong quest.

name: Cartethyia | Wheel Spin
description: Spin wheel NPC related to the Cartethyia event.
